role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (deciduous, grasses) and biomes.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure, curbs, and utility poles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (vehicle models, pole styles) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Bulgaria as the ground truth. The agents adhered to their domains, and the meta/regulatory agents provided the specific infrastructure cues (curbs, poles) that drove the final decision.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hills, trees, and roofs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate deciduous vegetation match.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles and curbs match.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of vehicle types and infrastructure match.
